settings.description: Voxel Forge operates from a single proposition — that an object should hold the same precision in its unseen surfaces as in its primary face. These are the disciplines that make that proposition true.

settings.title: Geometry first
settings.body: Every object originates as a parametric definition. Curvature, wall thickness, and tolerance are derived — never sketched.

settings.title: Material as decision
settings.body: PLA Carbon Fibre, PETG, resin-infused polymer. The material is selected for the object's structural reality, not its appearance.

settings.title: Edition discipline
settings.body: Série I is open. Série II is sealed at 200 per design. Atelier exists only by application. Scarcity is recorded, not implied.

settings.title: Chennai origin
settings.body: Designed, printed, and finished within a single studio. Provenance is traceable to a layer height, not a country of origin.

settings.text: Quiet dispatches when a new edition opens, and the occasional process note. No promotions.
